heading: Irvine basin groundwater and surface water improvement projects
label: 390h–18 Irvine basin groundwater and surface water improvement projects
notes: Prior ProvisionsAnother was renumbered 1637 and is classified to .section 1636 of Pub. L. 102–575section 390h–19 of this title

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary, in cooperation with the Irvine Ranch Water District, California, is authorized to participate in the design, planning, and construction of projects to naturally treat impaired surface water, reclaim and reuse impaired groundwater, and provide brine disposal within the San Diego Creek Watershed.

children.heading: Cost share
children.label: b Cost share
children.text: The Federal share of the costs of the projects authorized by this section shall not exceed 25 percent of the total cost.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: The Secretary shall not provide funds for the operation or maintenance of a project authorized by this section.
